reasoning: The control CP-2(5) focuses on ensuring continuity of mission and business functions, which in a Kubernetes context translates to ensuring that critical components are backed up, highly available, and resilient to disruptions. This includes configuring etcd backups to prevent data loss, ensuring the API server is highly available, enabling cluster autoscaling to handle load variations, and setting Pod Disruption Budgets to maintain application availability during maintenance or failures.
title: Contingency Plan - Contingency plan | continue mission and business functions plan for the continua
